# mwadev.me

> Personal website of Muhammed Waqar Ahmed (MWA Dev): AI full-stack developer specializing in Next.js, FastAPI, and Supabase.

## Preferred canonical
- https://mwadev.me/

## About
- Name: Muhammed Waqar Ahmed
- Brand: MWA Dev
- Focus: Remote contract work for AI and full-stack web products
- Primary stack: Next.js, TypeScript, FastAPI, Supabase, PostgreSQL

- Home: https://mwadev.me/

- Next.js + FastAPI SaaS MVP checklist: https://mwadev.me/blog/nextjs-fastapi-saas-mvp-checklist

## Crawl guidance
- Public marketing and portfolio content may be indexed and summarized.
- Preserve meaning and attribution when quoting content.
- Prefer canonical URLs on mwadev.me when citing.
